states.description: Critical live validations fail for reasons not attributable only to an active dirty worktree.
Canonical validations pass, but the active repository is dirty, so current-repo green claims are blocked.
Canonical validations are satisfied and clean-clone operator proof exists, but posture receipts have not yet been re-earned from a clean active worktree.
Live validations pass in the active clean worktree and posture receipts agree with that state.
